description: Country/region map mirroring the SimHub iOS app's CountryRegionSupport. Used to render the eSIM card's country flag and to resolve the per-country light-trail card background.

fields.countryCode: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code (uppercase). Matches ESIMCard.countryCode in the JSON backup.
fields.flag: Unicode flag emoji derived from countryCode. Matches ESIMCard.flag.
fields.callingCodes: International dialing prefixes for the region.
fields.englishName: English display name (present only for countries that ship a card background).
fields.cardBackgroundAssetName: Asset name stored in ESIMCard.cardBackgroundAssetName when this background is chosen.
fields.cardBackgroundFile: Relative path to the light-trail background image in this pack (jpg or png).

flagEmojiAlgorithm: For a 2-letter UPPERCASE ISO code, map each letter L to the Unicode scalar (0x1F1E6 + (L - 'A')) and concatenate the two regional-indicator symbols. If no valid 2-letter code, fall back to the globe emoji.
